codeReview.summary: The blocking issue has been fixed by the scrutiny validator. FrozenRequirementRegistry is now integrated into the Orchestrator struct and verify_traceability() is called in both create_task() and create_task_with_autonomy(). Tasks are only rejected if the registry is non-empty (empty registry = no requirements to enforce, preventing false rejections during initial use). SwellError::TaskNotTracedToSpec was added as the error variant for traceability rejections.

issues.description: Blocking issue: FrozenRequirementRegistry was not wired into Orchestrator. FIXED: Added frozen_registry: FrozenRequirementRegistry field to Orchestrator struct, initialized with empty registry in new() and with_checkpoint_manager(). Added verify_traceability() call in create_task() and create_task_with_autonomy() with non-empty check to prevent false rejections.
Added TaskNotTracedToSpec(String) variant to SwellError for traceability rejection.

summary: PASS after fix. The verify_traceability() check is now called in both create_task() and create_task_with_autonomy(). The check only rejects tasks when the registry is non-empty (has spec requirements), preventing false rejections during initial use. All 16 frozen_spec tests pass. cargo clippy passes.
